metadata.notes: Generated from the updated PDF guide. Protected content was not scraped, previewed, watched, or summarized; this file organizes visible titles, sections, links, and metadata only.

pathways.title: Beginner Pathway
pathways.description: Start here if you are new to ambient production or my teaching style.
pathways.recommendedFor: New members and beginning ambient producers.

pathways.title: Sound Design Pathway
pathways.description: Hands-on patch creation across Vital, Pigments, Omnisphere, Serum, Phase Plant, and more.
pathways.recommendedFor: Members who want stronger synthesis, patch design, texture, pads, plucks, and motion.

pathways.title: Mixing Pathway
pathways.description: Tighten your low end, open the space, and learn practical approaches to clean, musical ambient mixes.
pathways.recommendedFor: Members who want cleaner mixes, better space, frequency balance, and mastering perspective.

pathways.title: Chill Ambient Pathway
pathways.description: A focused route through the chill series and related walkthroughs.
pathways.recommendedFor: Members interested in chill ambient production, softer grooves, and relaxed ambient arrangement.

pathways.title: Dub Techno Pathway
pathways.description: Short, punchy lessons to weave dub flavors into your ambient work.
pathways.recommendedFor: Members who want dub techno techniques, delay movement, chords, and ambient rhythm.

pathways.title: Pure Ambient Pathway
pathways.description: The Art of Spiritually Charged Ambient.
pathways.recommendedFor: Members who want meditative, deep, spacious, and emotionally focused ambient work.

pathways.title: Sequenced Space Ambient Pathway
pathways.description: In the style of Ascendant, Starterra, Transponder, and the sequenced sound of Synphaera.
pathways.recommendedFor: Members interested in sequenced space ambient, generative movement, and cosmic composition.
